verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Spirit of God Move Write Your Word in my heart Fill my whole being Consume my life Spirit of God move An empty vessel I want to be So that You can come Lord, and fill me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Abba Father, here's what I cry, "Come by here, Lord, Your Spirit You won't deny" When I see your wrath fixing To be poured on this earth For this Message that was heard, My desperate cry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I lift my hands in surrender Laying all on the altar I don't want to pretend But be sealed by Your hand I will take Your Word And I'll hide it in my heart 'Till every fiber of my being Has that desperate cry

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've recognized Your Voice I've understood the call Help me not to faint But stand and overcome Lord I just want to please You That's all I want to do So from my soul now I cry to You
